human.description: Versatile and adaptable, humans have no inherent limitations.
human.lore: The primary inhabitants of the Kingdom of Valoria, humans are adaptable survivors who thrive in diverse environments.

cavia.description: Large, intelligent guinea pigs created by ancient Aethel experiments. Dimensionally sensitive and mysteriously resilient.

special_abilities.name: Dimensional Sensitivity
special_abilities.description: Heightened awareness of Aethel energies and portal activity. Can sense tremors and dimensional instability before others.

special_abilities.name: Shadow Blight Resistance
special_abilities.description: As living artifacts of failed Aethel experiments, Cavia possess an innate resistance to Shadow Blight corruption.

cavia.lore: Created millennia ago by the Aethel Imperium during unstable dimensional experiments, the Cavia are living, furry artifacts of ancient mistakes. Most people simply accept them as another species, unaware of their tragic origin.
special_notes: Nobody can tell if a Cavia is male or female
Natural burrowing instincts make them excellent miners
Fur stands on end near strong dimensional energies

dwarf.description: Hardy mountain folk known for their craftsmanship, resilience, and deep connection to stone and metal.

special_abilities.name: Stone Cunning
special_abilities.description: Innate knowledge of stonework and underground passages. Can detect unusual stonework, traps, and hidden passages.

special_abilities.name: Dwarven Resilience
special_abilities.description: Legendary fortitude against poison and disease.

special_abilities.name: Mining Expertise
special_abilities.description: Deep knowledge of ore, minerals, and mining techniques. Can identify valuable deposits and detect structural weaknesses.

dwarf.lore: The stout folk of the Drakon Peak mountains, dwarves are master craftsmen and miners. Their knowledge of stone and metal is unmatched, making them invaluable in the mining regions like the Crimson Reach.
special_notes: Natural affinity for detecting mineral deposits
Resistant to the effects of underground gases
Can work longer without rest in mines and caves

drow.description: Dark elves from the deep underground, masters of stealth and shadow magic with keen senses adapted to darkness.

special_abilities.name: Superior Darkvision
special_abilities.description: Exceptional vision in darkness. Can see in complete darkness as if it were dim light.

special_abilities.name: Fey Ancestry
special_abilities.description: Innate resistance to magical charm and sleep effects.

special_abilities.name: Shadow Step
special_abilities.description: Natural affinity for moving unseen in shadows and dim light. Bonus to stealth in darkness.

drow.lore: Mysterious denizens of the deep caverns beneath Valoria, drow are rarely seen on the surface. Those who do emerge often seek redemption or have been exiled from their underground cities.
special_notes: Sensitive to bright sunlight (no mechanical penalty in this game)
Natural proficiency with stealth and deception
Often misunderstood and mistrusted by surface dwellers
